reason: Verify the runner implementation matches the verified-green driver sketch: prompt is positional, --dangerously-skip-permissions present, XDG sandbox env exported, slim agent used, no task: allow.
Verify provider config: correct base URL, dotted model id, temp=0.3, no seed assumption, rate-limit awareness for batch concurrency.
Verify MCP allowlist whitelists ONLY abcoder + gitnexus + base file/shell tools; deny everything else. Verify per-repo indexes exist before benchmark run.
Cross-check that calibration smoke-test was run before full 240, all 4 arms behave per spec, decision rules in PRD are computed correctly in the findings memo.
Bench/ Python scripts conform to project convention.
Any new helpers in bench/ should have unit tests where the contract is non-trivial (parsing JSONL, aggregator math, etc.).
